hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -q 'git push' && git -C /Users/brohalskyi/bookit/bookit diff --name-only origin/main HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^api/' && cd /Users/brohalskyi/bookit/bookit && docker compose --profile tools run --rm lint || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -q 'git push' && git -C /Users/brohalskyi/bookit/bookit diff --name-only origin/main HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^web/' && cd /Users/brohalskyi/bookit/bookit/web && npm run typecheck && npm run lint || true
